name: ih-common
documentation:
# py-common

public tools of InHand Networks
Author: han@inhand.com.cn

Common Tools

methods.name: inhand.service.HdfsService.HdfsService.cat
documentation: 读取hdfs文件内容,将每行存入数组返回

methods.name: inhand.service.MongoService.MongoDBService.find
documentation: 根据${query}查找多条记录 query: {field: ${filed_filter}},sort: [{field: ${1 | -1}}]

methods.name: inhand.utilities.DateTimeUtility.DatetimeUtility.day_scope
documentation: 返回当天的0点和第二天的0点两个时间

methods.name: inhand.utilities.DateTimeUtility.DatetimeUtility.date_range
documentation: 返回从开始到结束时间的日期字符串series

methods.name: inhand.utilities.Utility.StatisticsVar.__init__
documentation: value： 当前值，通过此值，经过计算，汇总到current
timestamp： 本次数据的时间戳
last： 上次统计的时间错
